title: Basic JavaScript Authentication and Authorization
description: Write a function that demonstrates the core concepts of JavaScript Authentication and Authorization. Focus on implementing JWT (JSON Web Tokens) correctly.

title: Intermediate JavaScript Authentication and Authorization
description: Create a function that uses JWT (JSON Web Tokens) and OAuth2 flow together. Handle edge cases and validate inputs.

title: Advanced JavaScript Authentication and Authorization Project
description: Build a small application that applies JWT (JSON Web Tokens), OAuth2 flow, Session vs token auth in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

title: Debugging JavaScript Authentication and Authorization
description: The following code has bugs related to JWT (JSON Web Tokens). Find and fix them.

title: Refactoring JavaScript Authentication and Authorization
description: Refactor the following code to use modern JavaScript patterns with JWT (JSON Web Tokens) and OAuth2 flow.
